data.body:
[Galaxy Store Launch Pre-Event]

Great news, Sensei - Blue Archive is coming to the Galaxy Store!
Join the pre-registration event and receive exciting rewards!

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?thread=2312063
